commitResults.messageTitle: Add Virtual File System (VFS) core implementation (#8)
commitResults.messageBody:
Implements the foundational VFS layer for LinuxLingo shell simulation:

- FileNode.java: Abstract base class representing a generic filesystem node,
  with support for name, parent reference, permissions, and absolute path resolution.
- Directory.java: Concrete directory node with child node management
  (add, remove, lookup by name).
- RegularFile.java: Concrete regular file node holding text content.
- Permission.java: Unix-style permission model (rwxrwxrwx string parsing,
  octal representation, read/write/execute checks for owner/group/others).
- VfsException.java: Unchecked exception for VFS-specific error signalling.
- VirtualFileSystem.java: Facade providing full path resolution, directory
  listing, file/directory creation and deletion, copy, move, working-directory
  management, and a default in-memory filesystem tree (/home/user, /tmp, /etc).

Resolves #8

commitResults.messageTitle: Merge pull request #9 from Michael-wzl/branch-wangziling-VFS

commitResults.messageTitle: Add project scaffold: infrastructure, stubs, and question bank data (#14)
commitResults.messageBody: Add project scaffold: infrastructure, stubs, and question bank data\n\nRefs #10, #11, #12, #13

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix CI: update build config, tests, and resolve checkstyle violations (#15)
commitResults.messageBody:
- build.gradle: Update mainClass from seedu.duke.Duke to linuxlingo.LinuxLingo;
  rename shadowJar archiveBaseName from 'duke' to 'LinuxLingo'
- Replace seedu.duke.DukeTest with linuxlingo.shell.vfs.VirtualFileSystemTest
  (14 unit tests covering VFS resolve, CRUD, copy, move, deepCopy)
- text-ui-test: Update input.txt and EXPECTED.TXT for LinuxLingo interactive mode
- Fix checkstyle violations:
  - Permission.java: Expand one-liner accessors and compact switch blocks into
    properly braced multi-line statements; extract applyPermissionOp helper
  - LinuxLingo.java: Add braces to single-line if construct
  - ResourceExtractor.java: Fix array initializer indentation
  - QuestionBank.java: Reorder overloaded getQuestions() methods to be adjacent
- Make startup-path stubs (ResourceExtractor.extractIfNeeded, QuestionBank.load)
  no-op instead of throwing UnsupportedOperationException, so the app boots
  cleanly before those stubs are implemented

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix QuestionParser to handle escaped pipe `\\|` in FITB answers (#51)
commitResults.messageBody: Use negative lookbehind regex so `\\|` is not treated as an answer separator in FITB questions. Add `.replace(\"\\\\|\", \"|\")` to unescape pipe characters in accepted answers.\n\nCloses #45

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix VfsSerializer deserialization of files with empty content (#52)
commitResults.messageBody: After trimming, re-append a trailing space when the line ends with `|` (indicating empty content), so `split(\" \\\\| \", 4)` produces the expected 4 parts.\n\nCloses #46

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix GrepCommand stdin filtering and add -v invert match flag (#53)
commitResults.messageBody: Fix stdin being passed through without filtering by assigning it to the content variable. Add `-v` (invert match) flag support with flag parsing and inversion logic.\n\nCloses #44

commitResults.messageTitle: Add comprehensive unit tests for shell components (#55)
commitResults.messageBody:
Add 39 unit tests for shell components:
- ShellSessionTest (15 tests): executeOnce, REPL, pipe, redirect, operators
- CdCommandTest (10 tests): home, absolute, swap, parent, error handling
- LsCommandTest (9 tests): dir listing, hidden files, long format, flags
- BuiltinCommandTest (5 tests): help, clear, reset

Closes #48

commitResults.messageTitle: Add comprehensive unit tests for storage and exam modules (#56)
commitResults.messageBody:
Add 44 unit tests for storage and exam modules:
- VfsSerializerTest (12 tests): serialize/deserialize round-trip, escape/unescape, permissions
- QuestionParserTest (14 tests): MCQ, FITB, PRAC parsing, escaped pipe, malformed lines
- QuestionBankTest (10 tests): topic loading, random questions, count limits
- ExamResultTest (8 tests): scoring, percentage calculation, display format

Closes #49

commitResults.messageTitle: Add integration tests and extend GrepCommand test coverage (#57)
commitResults.messageBody:
Add 29 integration tests covering end-to-end workflows:
- File, piping, redirect, navigation, operator, permission, text processing workflows
- VFS serialization round-trip, REPL session, complex multi-step scenarios

Extend GrepCommand tests with 5 new tests for -v flag and stdin filtering.

Closes #50
